summary: Completed testing of driver portal filter and sort functionality. Driver portal loads correctly and displays expected UI elements, but session management issues prevent complete interactive testing of filter and sort features.

integration_issues.issue: Session expires during testing causing redirects to login page, preventing thorough testing of interactive features

passed_tests: Driver portal loads successfully with correct URL (/driver-portal)
Driver login functionality works with provided credentials (driver@test.com)
Driver dashboard displays correctly with driver information (Leanne Carter)
Orders section is accessible and active by default
Orders count display working - Today (0) and All (0) tabs visible
Sort indicator visible showing 'Sorted: Newest first'
Bottom navigation shows Orders, Earnings, Map, Profile sections
Filter and sort buttons are present in the interface
action_item_for_main_agent: Investigate and fix session management issues in driver portal that cause session timeouts during testing. The filtering and sorting UI elements appear to be implemented correctly based on code review and initial interface observation, but session expiration prevents thorough interactive testing of these features.
